_comment: Shared FeeMath vectors pinning sim/wethsim/feemath.py to src/weth/lib/FeeMath.sol. The Solidity side asserts the same table (duplicated as constants in test/WethWstGbpFeeMath.t.sol test_sharedSimVectors — fs_permissions deliberately do not cover this file). params fields override the defaults (3000/500/200/10000/3000/1000/500000/6000). ALSO pins the wstGBP/USDC venue (src/usdc/lib/FeeMath.sol, 9-field struct, table duplicated in test/UsdcWstGbpFeeMath.t.sol test_sharedSimVectors) AND the XAUT/wstGBP venue (src/xaut/lib/FeeMath.sol, 10-field struct, table duplicated in test/XautWstGbpFeeMath.t.sol test_sharedSimVectors): all three have identical swapFee/surchargePpm semantics, and their structs differ only in staleness fields, which these vectors never touch; fork this file only if the venues' swap-fee semantics ever deliberately diverge.
